question_intent: average royalty per author for titles published by Algodata Infosystems

plan.question_intent: average royalty per author for titles published by Algodata Infosystems
plan.detail_query: SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titles.title, titles.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titleauthor.royaltyper, roysched.royalty FROM authors JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id WHERE publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems'

steps.sql:
SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titles.title, titles.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titleauthor.royaltyper, roysched.royalty
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems')

build_logs.notes: final scalar block calculating the average royalty per author for titles published by Algodata Infosystems

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titles.title, titles.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titleauthor.royaltyper, roysched.royalty
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper * leaf_1.royalty / 100.0) AS average_royalty_per_author
FROM (SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titles.title, titles.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titleauthor.royaltyper, roysched.royalty
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT au_fname
FROM (SELECT au_fname, book_count FROM (SELECT authors.au_fname, COUNT(titles.title_id) AS book_count
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems')
GROUP BY authors.au_fname) ORDER BY book_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS top_author

SELECT AVG(price) AS avg_price
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, t.price, a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.contract
FROM titles AS t
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN authors AS a ON ta.au_id = a.au_id
WHERE (a.contract = 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the royalty amount (calculated as royalty percentage multiplied by royalty value) per author for books published by Algodata Infosystems?
